name: curator-bookmarks
description: Curator — Chrome 本地书签管理扩展

scripts.test: npm run test:popup-search-focus && npm run test:popup-session && npm run test:dashboard-virtual && npm run test:dashboard-classes && npm run test:background-gallery-refresh && npm run test:newtab-ui && npm run test:content-extraction && npm run test:ai-runtime
scripts.test:ai-runtime: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --rootDir src/shared --outDir .tmp-test/ai-runtime --noEmit false src/shared/ai-runtime.ts src/shared/ai-response.ts src/shared/ai-provider-url.ts src/shared/ai-runtime.test.ts && node .tmp-test/ai-runtime/ai-runtime.test.js
scripts.test:popup-search-focus: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --rootDir src/popup --outDir .tmp-test/popup-search-focus --noEmit false src/popup/popup-search-focus.ts src/popup/popup-search-focus.test.ts && node .tmp-test/popup-search-focus/popup-search-focus.test.js
scripts.test:popup-session: tsc --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --jsx react-jsx --skipLibCheck --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-test/popup-session --noEmit false src/popup/popup-smart-classifier-status.test.ts src/popup/popup-controller-store.test.ts src/popup/popup-critical-shell.test.ts src/popup/popup-preboot-input.test.ts src/popup/popup-active-result-indicator-style.test.ts src/popup/popup-active-result-scroll.test.ts src/popup/popup-keyboard-navigation.test.ts src/popup/smart-loading-progress.test.ts src/popup/popup-smart-progress-style.test.ts && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-smart-classifier-status.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-controller-store.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-critical-shell.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-preboot-input.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-active-result-indicator-style.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-active-result-scroll.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-keyboard-navigation.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/smart-loading-progress.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-test/popup-session/popup/popup-smart-progress-style.test.js
scripts.test:dashboard-virtual: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --rootDir src/options/sections --outDir .tmp-test/dashboard-virtual --noEmit false src/options/sections/dashboard-virtual.ts src/options/sections/dashboard-virtual.test.ts && node .tmp-test/dashboard-virtual/dashboard-virtual.test.js
scripts.test:dashboard-classes: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --rootDir src/options/components --outDir .tmp-test/dashboard-classes --noEmit false src/options/components/option-layout-classes.ts src/options/components/dashboard-classes.ts src/options/components/dashboard-classes.test.ts && node .tmp-test/dashboard-classes/dashboard-classes.test.js
scripts.test:background-gallery-refresh: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --rootDir src/newtab --outDir .tmp-test/background-gallery-refresh --noEmit false src/newtab/background-gallery.ts src/newtab/featured-background-style.ts src/newtab/background-gallery-refresh.ts src/newtab/background-gallery-refresh.test.ts src/newtab/newtab-bookmark-preboot.ts src/newtab/newtab-bookmark-preboot.test.ts src/newtab/newtab-motion-classes.test.ts && node .tmp-test/background-gallery-refresh/background-gallery-refresh.test.js && node .tmp-test/background-gallery-refresh/newtab-bookmark-preboot.test.js && node .tmp-test/background-gallery-refresh/newtab-motion-classes.test.js
scripts.test:newtab-ui: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --rootDir src/newtab --outDir .tmp-test/newtab-ui --noEmit false src/newtab/newtab-search-focus.ts src/newtab/newtab-search-focus.test.ts src/newtab/background-mask-settings.ts src/newtab/newtab-background-settings-store.ts src/newtab/background-mask-settings.test.ts src/newtab/newtab-ui-contract.test.ts && node .tmp-test/newtab-ui/newtab-search-focus.test.js && node .tmp-test/newtab-ui/background-mask-settings.test.js && node .tmp-test/newtab-ui/newtab-ui-contract.test.js
scripts.test:content-extraction: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-test/content-extraction --noEmit false src/options/sections/content-extraction.ts src/options/sections/content-extraction.test.ts && node .tmp-test/content-extraction/options/sections/content-extraction.test.js
